message:
Running command: # Verify SWD fix still in place after amuxbus removal
grep -n "swclk\|swdi\|swdo\|tck\|tms\|trst" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -10
echo "---verify module port list ends correctly---"
# Check the area around the end of port list (should end with ); )
grep -n ");" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v | head -5
